title: hoiriri kuntzeana
side_effects: Hoiriri kuntzeana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and hormonal imbalances. Ingesting large quantities can lead to symptoms like diarrhea, stomach cramps, and nausea, while prolonged use may disrupt thyroid function or exacerbate existing hormonal conditions. Some individuals may also experience skin irritation, itching, or rashes due to contact dermatitis or sensitivity to the plant's sap. Furthermore, improper handling and preparation can result in the contamination of the plant, increasing the risk of infections or other health complications.
